rule_metadata.author: Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya, Trellix
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Calc Child Process

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Calc Child Process
id: 76c86421-c373-4cac-9510-66455bc5fcd5
status: experimental
description: Detects the suspicious child process of calc
references:
- https://www.trellix.com/en-us/about/newsroom/stories/research/demystifying-qbot-malware.html
author: Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya, Trellix
date: 2022/04/08
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \calc.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \rundll32.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
